message:
feat(command_guard): add operational telemetry counters to CommandGuard [ft-3kxe.27]

Add CommandGuardTelemetry with 5 counters tracking evaluations, allowed,
blocked, warned, quick-reject, and audit-clear operations. Wire counter
increments into evaluate() and clear_audit_log(). Add 14 tests (9 unit +
5 property) validating counter accuracy, sum invariant, monotonicity, and
serde roundtrip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
